creator: giles@nemeton.com.au
text:
Panic if you absentmindedly exclude the floppy disk controller
	when tossing assorted Adaptec, Ultrastore, IDE and who knows
	what devices. ;-)

Fix: 

Perhaps protect the floppy disk controller like the PCI stuff?
	It doesn't make sense to exclude it when you have just booted
	from it!
How-To-Repeat: 
	In the visual kernel configuration hit 'delete' on the
	floppy disk controller.
